column1: # schema: 5
# MacStudio LLM — model catalog (seed)
# Pipe-delimited, shell-readable, TUI-editable (see `llm-models`). This file is a
# SEED: on `setup.sh --apply` it is copied to /usr/local/etc/macstudio-models/catalog.tsv
# only if that file is absent or has an older "# schema:" line (old one is backed up
# first). After that the live copy is TUI-owned — add models via `llm-models`.
# Only READY, pre-converted MLX repos belong here (NO local conversion). Source =
# HuggingFace, repo-ids are `org/name` (not URLs). Gated repos (gated=yes) need an HF
# token (`llm-models` -> t) + accepting the licence on the model page.
# Roles (the backend is fixed per role):
#   role=text   -> alias 'main'. Engine = TEXT_ENGINE: mlx-vlm (DEFAULT — UNIFIED text+images,
#                  KV-quant; needs a VLM arch like gemma-4) | mlx-lm (text-only, broad archs).
#   role=ocr    -> mlx-vlm (alias 'ocr', on-demand document OCR).
#   role=vision -> mlx-vlm (alias 'vision', on-demand images; only needed in mlx-lm mode —
#                  under mlx-vlm the 'main' already does images). None seeded by default.
# BROKEN[mlx-lm] (or a bare BROKEN) -> refused by set_model_alias. BROKEN[vllm] is historical.
# Sampling cols 14-17 (temperature/top_p/frequency_penalty/presence_penalty) = per-model
# defaults injected into the LiteLLM 'main' alias (clients can override). Empty for ocr/vision.
# This seed is intentionally LEAN: a gemma-4 unified main + GLM-OCR. Add more (granite/qwen/
# glm/etc.) via `llm-models` — e.g. if you switch to TEXT_ENGINE=mlx-lm for a text-only main.
# columns:
# id|hf_repo|role|engine|quant|gb|gated|reasoning_parser|tool_parser|max_kv_size|max_num_seqs|rating|notes|temperature|top_p|frequency_penalty|presence_penalty

gemma4-26b|mlx-community/gemma-4-26b-a4b-it-4bit|text|mlxvlm|4bit|16|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|3|5|DEFAULT unified main (TEXT_ENGINE=mlx-vlm): text + images + tool calling in ONE model, ~24 tok/s, KV-quant. 26B-A4B MoE, strong German; gated. native max: 262144 (256K)|0.7|0.95|0.3|0.3

gemma4-12b|mlx-community/gemma-4-12B-it-4bit|text|mlxvlm|4bit|8|yes|gemma4|gemma4|131072|6|4|Lighter unified main (mlx-vlm): text+images+tools, smaller/faster than 26b. gemma4_unified arch -> BROKEN[mlx-lm] (runs ONLY on mlx-vlm). German; gated. native max: 262144 (256K)|0.7|0.95|0.3|0.3
glm-ocr|mlx-community/GLM-OCR-4bit|ocr|mlxvlm|4bit|2|no|||||5|Default OCR, on-demand. #1 OmniDocBench. GLMOCR_MAX_TOKENS=8192 covers a full page. alt: mlx-community/GLM-OCR-bf16||||
